body:
Hi Angela,

Following up on caseload distribution for May. With the two new post-op ACL referrals coming in from Dr. Whitford's group, we're going to be over capacity on the afternoon block. Can you take on the Mondays/Wednesdays 2-5pm slots? I'd keep your gait-training patients on your existing schedule.

Also, your annual competency review is due by end of month. Let's find 30 minutes this week.

Best,
Anita
snippet: Following up on caseload distribution for May. With the two new post-op ACL ref...
subject: May caseload + competency review

body:
Hi Dr. Larson,

I can take the Mon/Wed 2-5pm block. I'd like to keep the early-stage ACL patients on a twice-weekly cadence for the first six weeks given the graft protection timeline, then taper. I'll coordinate with the front desk on scheduling.

For the competency review, I'm open Thursday after 4pm or Friday morning before clinic. Either works.

Thanks,
Angela
snippet: I can take the Mon/Wed 2-5pm block. I'd like to keep the early-stage ACL patient...
subject: Re: May caseload + competency review

body:
Friday 8am it is. One more thing — there's a vestibular rehab continuing-ed course in November (16 CEUs) that I think would round out your certifications nicely. The clinic will cover registration if you're interested. Let me know and I'll submit it.

Anita
snippet: Friday 8am it is. One more thing — there's a vestibular rehab continuing-ed cour...
subject: Re: May caseload + competency review

body:
Yes, please sign me up for the vestibular course — that's been on my list for a while. Thanks for thinking of it. I'll forward my license number for the registration form this afternoon.

Angela
snippet: Yes, please sign me up for the vestibular course — that's been on my list for a ...
subject: Re: May caseload + competency review

body:
Oi Angela,

For Saturday's kids block — we've got 14 confirmed now, mostly the 7-10 age group. I was thinking we warm up with ginga drills, then split into two rodas so the newer kids aren't overwhelmed. Can you bring the smaller berimbau? Mine needs a new cabaça.

Also a parent asked about the batizado in November. Should I start a sign-up sheet?

Axé,
Tomás
snippet: For Saturday's kids block — we've got 14 confirmed now, mostly the 7-10 age grou...
subject: Saturday kids block + batizado sign-up

body:
Oi Tomás,

Good plan. Two rodas for the kids is smart — let's keep the newer ones in the circle nearest the door so parents can watch. I'll bring the small berimbau and an extra pair of caxixi. Remind me to tune them before we start, last week the A-string was flat.

Yes, start the batizado sign-up. The ceremony is Saturday Nov 14 and Mestre Pintado is coming, so I want corda assignments locked by mid-October. Let's cap it at 20 kids so the roda doesn't run too long.

Axé,
Angela
snippet: Good plan. Two rodas for the kids is smart — let's keep the newer ones in the ci...
subject: Re: Saturday kids block + batizado sign-up

body:
Perfect. I'll set up the sign-up sheet tonight and post it in the academy group. Also heads up — three new student inquiries came through the website this week, two adults and one teen. Want me to schedule them for a trial class Saturday or do you want to meet them first?

Axé,
Tomás
snippet: I'll set up the sign-up sheet tonight and post it in the academy group. Also hea...
subject: Re: Saturday kids block + batizado sign-up

body:
Schedule all three for Saturday's open adult/teen hour — that's the easiest way for them to feel the energy of the roda. I'll greet them and run intake. Send them the waiver and the Stripe link for the intro month ($60) ahead of time so we're not doing paperwork on the floor.

Axé,
Angela
snippet: Schedule all three for Saturday's open adult/teen hour — that's the easiest way ...
subject: Re: Saturday kids block + batizado sign-up

body:
Querida Angela,

Fico muito feliz que você vai fazer a avaliação de Mestre Instrutor no batizado, dia 14 de novembro. Você trabalhou muito por isso e o seu axé é forte. Vou observar a sua ginga, o seu jogo na roda, e principalmente como você ensina os alunos — é isso que faz um mestre.

Manda o cronograma da cerimônia quando puder. Chego em Sacramento na sexta antes.

Axé,
Mestre Pintado
snippet: Fico muito feliz que você vai fazer a avaliação de Mestre Instrutor no batizado,...
subject: Avaliação de Mestre Instrutor - 14/11

body:
Mestre Pintado,

Muito obrigada pelas suas palavras — significa tudo para mim. Estou preparando os alunos para o batizado e vou mandar o cronograma completo da cerimônia até o fim do mês: a roda das crianças primeiro, depois a troca de cordas, e a roda dos adultos no final.

Será uma honra jogar na sua frente. Te busco no aeroporto na sexta. Axé, Mestre.

Angela
snippet: Muito obrigada pelas suas palavras — significa tudo para mim. Estou preparando o...
subject: Re: Avaliação de Mestre Instrutor - 14/11

body:
Perfeito, querida. Para a avaliação, quero ver você conduzir a bateria pelo menos uma vez — quem comanda o berimbau comanda a roda. Pratica os toques: Angola, São Bento Grande, e Iúna. Confio em você.

Axé,
Mestre Pintado
snippet: Para a avaliação, quero ver você conduzir a bateria pelo menos uma vez — quem co...
subject: Re: Avaliação de Mestre Instrutor - 14/11

body:
Hey Angela!

Garmin says we hit 62 miles on Sunday's loop with 3,100 ft of climbing — solid. Your normalized power was up from last month, the threshold work is paying off. If we want to be ready for the Gold Country Century on Oct 18 we should start stacking back-to-back long days.

Proposal: this Saturday we do the 75-mile Folsom-Auburn route, then an easy recovery spin Sunday. You in?
snippet: Garmin says we hit 62 miles on Sunday's loop with 3,100 ft of climbing — solid. ...
subject: Century training - back-to-back long days

body:
I'm in for Saturday. 75 with the Auburn climb is a good simulation of the Gold Country profile. Let's roll out at 6:30am to beat the heat — it's supposed to hit 95 by afternoon. I'll bring extra electrolyte tabs and we should plan a real food stop around mile 40 in Auburn.

My knee's been a little cranky on long descents, so I'll tape it and we keep the recovery spin truly easy Sunday — zone 1 only, no ego.

See you Saturday!
Angela
snippet: I'm in for Saturday. 75 with the Auburn climb is a good simulation of the Gold C...
subject: Re: Century training - back-to-back long days

body:
6:30 works. I'll load the route to both our Garmins and share the GPX. Food stop in Auburn is a must — last time I bonked at mile 50 because someone (me) only ate one gel the whole ride.

Take care of that knee, PT lady. We've got four months and I'm not finishing that century without you.
snippet: I'll load the route to both our Garmins and share the GPX. Food stop in Auburn i...
subject: Re: Century training - back-to-back long days

body:
Hey love, can you grab a few things on your way home from clinic? We're out of black beans, rice, eggs, and Lucia drank the last of the oat milk. Also Mateus has a soccer game Saturday at 9 so we'll need to be out the door early — does that clash with your Roots block?

Thinking taco night tonight if you're up for it. xo Sofia
snippet: Can you grab a few things on your way home from clinic? We're out of black beans...
subject: Groceries + Saturday logistics

body:
On it — beans, rice, eggs, oat milk. I'll add coffee too, we're almost out. Taco night yes please.

Mateus's 9am game is fine, the kids block doesn't start til 10:30 and Tomás opens the academy, so I can drop Mateus, catch the first half, and head straight over. Can you take Lucia to the game or should we tag-team? Love you. — Angie
snippet: On it — beans, rice, eggs, oat milk. I'll add coffee too, we're almost out. Taco...
subject: Re: Groceries + Saturday logistics

body:
Maninha querida,

Saudade de você! Aqui em São Paulo está tudo corrido mas bem. As crianças mandam beijos pra tia Angela, pra Sofia, e pros primos Mateus e Lucia. A mamãe (Tereza) me ligou ontem perguntando de você — ela anda meio esquecida das coisas, acho bom você falar com o médico dela.

Quando vocês vêm visitar o Brasil? Já faz tempo demais. Te amo. Abraço,
Digo
snippet: Saudade de você! Aqui em São Paulo está tudo corrido mas bem. As crianças mandam...
subject: Saudade - notícias daqui

body:
Digo, meu irmão,

Que saudade! Os beijos das crianças derreteram meu coração. Mateus e Lucia também mandam abraço — o Mateus está jogando futebol agora, igualzinho você na nossa idade.

Sobre a mamãe, você tem razão, estou preocupada. Já marquei uma consulta com a Dra. Priya Nair pra ela. Vou cuidar disso, fica tranquilo. A gente está pensando em ir pro Brasil no fim do ano, depois do batizado da academia em novembro. Te conto mais por telefone.

Te amo demais. Beijo,
Angela
snippet: Que saudade! Os beijos das crianças derreteram meu coração. Mateus e Lucia tamb-...
subject: Re: Saudade - notícias daqui

body:
Hi Angela,

This is a reminder that your mother, Tereza Fry, has an appointment with Dr. Priya Nair on Tuesday, May 23 at 10:15am for a cognitive screening and medication review. Please bring her current medication list. As her listed care contact, you're welcome to attend.

Reply to confirm or call the office to reschedule.

Thank you,
Office of Dr. Priya Nair
snippet: This is a reminder that your mother, Tereza Fry, has an appointment with Dr. Priy...
subject: Appointment reminder - Tereza Fry, May 23

body:
Hi Dr. Nair,

Confirming Tuesday May 23 at 10:15am — I'll bring my mother and her medication list. I'd also like to discuss some recent memory lapses my brother and I have noticed; I can share specifics when we come in. Thank you for fitting her in.

Best,
Angela Fry
snippet: Confirming Tuesday May 23 at 10:15am — I'll bring my mother and her medication l...
subject: Re: Appointment reminder - Tereza Fry, May 23

body:
Hi Angela,

I've reconciled the Roots Martial Arts Academy books through May. A couple of notes before we file Q1 estimated taxes:

1. The Stripe membership income is up nicely — about $4,200/month average. Good problem to have.
2. I need receipts for the new berimbaus and floor mats to categorize as equipment.
3. Your Q1 estimated payment is due April 15 — I've drafted the voucher.

Can you send the receipts this week? Linda
snippet: I've reconciled the Roots Martial Arts Academy books through May. A couple of not...
subject: Roots Q1 books + estimated taxes

body:
Hi Linda,

Thanks for staying on top of this. I'll scan and send the equipment receipts (berimbaus, two sets of mats, and the new sound system for the roda) by Friday. Please go ahead and file the Q1 voucher — I'll transfer the payment amount to the business account today.

Quick question: with membership growing, should we revisit whether I'm setting aside enough for self-employment tax? Happy to bump the quarterly set-aside if needed.

Thanks,
Angela
snippet: Thanks for staying on top of this. I'll scan and send the equipment receipts (be...
subject: Re: Roots Q1 books + estimated taxes
